title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
author: nycdatasci
aiHeadline: Elon Musk's legal battle against OpenAI ends in defeat, proving that even tech titans can lose when they're not backed by Twitter threads.

title: Show HN: Files.md – Open-source alternative to Obsidian
author: zakirullin
aiHeadline: Files.md emerges as the open-source hero, slaying the dragon that is Obsidian's note-taking dominance with its own set of features that might just make you forget about the paid options.

title: Garry Tan, the CEO of YC, accused me of unethical reporting
author: gok
aiHeadline: Garry Tan, the CEO of YC, calls out someone for unethical reporting, which is about as surprising as a fish asking for a bicycle.

title: We stopped AI bot spam in our GitHub repo using Git's –author flag
author: ildari
aiHeadline: GitHub repo owners breathe a sigh of relief as AI bot spam is defeated by the humble Git –author flag, proving that sometimes the simplest solutions are the best.

title: Anthropic acquires Stainless
author: tomeraberbach
aiHeadline: Anthropic's acquisition of Stainless is the latest in a series of moves that make you wonder if these companies are just trying to collect all the shiny objects in the AI space.
